pages.title: Core Minerals
pages.text: $(li)Silicon Ore → Raw Silicon Crystal → Silicon Shard.$(br)$(li)Rare Earth Ore → Raw Rare Earth → Rare Earth Dust.$(br2)Both ores have stone-layer variants and deepslate variants below Y=0, and require a stone pickaxe or better. Refine raw minerals in a furnace or blast furnace; blasting is faster.

pages.title: Atmospheric Condenser
pages.text: Consumes glass bottles to make purified water, a stable supply for the incubator's P channel.

pages.title: Bio Incubator
pages.text: Uses shared N, P, and D resources to cultivate gene seeds into quality ingredients.

pages.title: Gene Splicer
pages.text: Consumes two parent seeds to breed offspring with new genes, mutations, or twins.

pages.title: Serum Bottler
pages.text: Processes three inputs into a Synaptic Neural Berry or an S-01, S-02, or S-03 serum.
